blockingIssues.description: prepare script `test -x node_modules/.bin/tsc && npm run build || true` swallows real build failures when tsc IS available (the `|| true` catches failed builds too). Should distinguish between 'tsc missing' (ok to skip) and 'build failed' (should propagate failure).

appliedUpdates.description: Added .factory/library/npm-git-install.md documenting npm GitHub shortcut install behavior, the prepare-script workaround for devDependencies/tsc availability, and the known || true limitation.
